display.purpose: One hero statement per page; the site's single loudest moment.

headline.purpose: Section titles, one per chapter of the scroll journey.

accent-serif.purpose: The italic punchline half of a two-part headline or hero line — never a full heading.

body.purpose: Paragraph copy at translucent-foam colors over the dark canvas.

label.purpose: Chapter kickers and credential-bar text; sparse, uppercase, wide-tracked.

wordmark.purpose: Reserved exclusively for the 'Gaelworx' name inside the funnel badge.

shadows.name: cta-glow
shadows.purpose: Resting elevation for primary CTA buttons.

shadows.name: cta-glow-hover
shadows.purpose: Hover state for primary CTA buttons.

shadows.name: badge-lift
shadows.purpose: Resting elevation for the Claim-This-Site funnel badge.

shadows.name: featured-plan-glow
shadows.purpose: Marks the 'Most Popular' plan card as elevated relative to siblings.

shadows.name: specular-edge
shadows.purpose: Top-edge light catch on structural glass surfaces; alpha never exceeds .05.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Structural transitions, e.g. job-gallery flex-grow accordion.

components.name: Primary CTA Button
components.description: Main call-to-action pill, e.g. 'Rescue my pool'.
components.css: .ds-btn-cta { cursor: pointer; border: none; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; letter-spacing: .01em; color: #052026; background: linear-gradient(135deg,#8ef0e6,#2bb3a9); padding: 17px 30px; border-radius: 999px; box-shadow: 0 10px 28px rgba(30,180,170,.42); transition: transform .3s ease, box-shadow .3s ease; } .ds-btn-cta:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 16px 38px rgba(30,180,170,.55); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action pill, e.g. 'See the transformation'.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #eafcfb; background: rgba(14,24,8,.42); border: 1px solid rgba(200,220,150,.32); padding: 17px 28px; border-radius: 999px; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); transition: background .3s ease, transform .3s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(20,34,12,.6); transform: translateY(-3px); }

components.name: Toggle Chip
components.description: Selectable pill with an active-state ring, used in the water-condition selector.
components.css: .ds-chip { position: relative; cursor: pointer; padding: 11px 16px; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(10,44,56,.55); border: 1px solid rgba(150,230,225,.2); color: #eafcfb; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13.5px; transition: border-color .3s ease; } .ds-chip:hover { border-color: rgba(127,227,218,.5); } .ds-chip-ring { position: absolute; inset: -1px; border-radius: 999px; border: 2px solid #7fe3da; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Plan Card
components.description: Pricing plan card; the featured variant adds a heavier border and glow.
components.css: .ds-card-plan { display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding: 34px 30px; border-radius: 24px; background: rgba(8,34,44,.5); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border: 1px solid rgba(150,230,225,.18); } .ds-card-plan-title { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 22px; color: #f2fdfb; } .ds-card-plan-price { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 6px; margin: 14px 0 20px; font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 44px; color: #f2fdfb; letter-spacing: -.02em; } .ds-card-plan-price span { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 400; color: rgba(214,240,236,.6); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Booking/contact form field, glass surface with teal focus border.
components.css: .ds-input { padding: 15px 16px; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(4,20,27,.55); border: 1px solid rgba(150,230,225,.22); color: #eafcfb; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(214,240,236,.4); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #7fe3da; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Top navigation link with teal hover.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14.5px; color: rgba(234,250,246,.82); text-decoration: none; transition: color .3s ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #7fe3da; }

components.name: Claim-This-Site Badge
components.description: Signature funnel component fixed bottom-right on every deployed site: spinning coin, ember-glowing Gaelworx wordmark, teal arrow chip.
components.html:
Claim this site
by Gaelworx→
components.css: .ds-badge { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 9px 16px 9px 9px; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(6,20,27,.72); backdrop-filter: blur(14px) saturate(120%); border: 1px solid rgba(150,230,225,.22); box-shadow: 0 16px 44px rgba(2,10,14,.55), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.05); text-decoration: none; transition: transform .35s cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1), box-shadow .35s ease; } .ds-badge-label { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 15.5px; color: #f2fdfb; } .ds-badge-wordmark { font-family: 'Grenze Gotisch', serif; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .04em; color: #ffb14d; } .ds-badge-arrow { flex: none; width: 32px; height: 32px; margin-left: 2px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg,#8ef0e6,#2bb3a9); color: #052026; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; }

narrative.overview: The whole site is one continuous rescue, staged as a scroll-driven journey rather than a stack of marketing sections. It opens in a murky, half-lit swamp — algae-olive accents, dim water, a WebGL surface the visitor scrolls through — and clears, screen by screen, into bright teal crystal water as the Meridian story does its work. The system rejects the pool-service category default (stock-photo blue water, franchise-brochure blandness) and the generic AI-SaaS default (gradient text, tiny tracked eyebrows on every section, identical icon-card grids, the hero-metric template) in the same motion: the drama comes from the water motif itself, not from decoration layered on top of a template.
keyCharacteristics: Dark, water-bound canvas (#0a1208 / #04141b) that the WebGL scene and gradients sit inside, never a light or neutral background.
Two-tier type voice: bold grotesque for statements, italic serif for the emotional turn inside the same sentence.
Glass-on-water surfaces (translucent, blurred, teal-bordered) standing in for the 'looking through water' motif — never decorative glassmorphism for its own sake.
One reserved bright-teal gradient, spent only on primary CTAs, the featured plan ribbon, and the funnel badge's arrow.
A single ornamental gothic face (Grenze Gotisch) reserved exclusively for the Gaelworx wordmark in the funnel badge.

rules.name: The One Gradient Rule
rules.body: The bright teal CTA gradient appears in exactly three places: primary buttons, the featured plan's ribbon, and the funnel badge's arrow. It never becomes a background wash, a card border, or a decorative flourish.

rules.name: The Warm-Means-Something Rule
rules.body: Olive, gold, and ember never appear together with the cool teal system in the same section. Warm = still dirty (olive), still a warning (gold), or still a funnel (ember).

rules.name: The Serif-Aside Rule
rules.body: Instrument Serif italic is a punctuation mark, not a typeface choice for whole headlines. If it's carrying more than half a sentence, it's being misused.

rules.name: The Glass-on-Water Rule
rules.body: backdrop-filter blur + a translucent teal-tinted background is the system's only depth cue for structural surfaces (nav, cards, inputs, badge). It's load-bearing to the water theme, not decorative glassmorphism.

dos: Do keep the cool teal system as the only accent that reads as 'clean water winning.'
Do reserve Grenze Gotisch for the Gaelworx wordmark only.
Do use glass surfaces as the elevation system; colored glow shadows only on genuinely interactive/lifted elements.
Do keep numbered chapter kickers only on sections that are real, ordered beats of the swamp-to-crystal narrative.
Do hold body-text contrast at ≥4.5:1 against the swamp-black/deep-water canvas.
donts: Don't introduce stock-photo blue-water treatments, franchise-brochure card grids, or generic 'Get a Free Quote!' banner styling anywhere in the template.
Don't use background-clip:text gradient text, side-stripe border accents, or a hero-metric template.
Don't stamp numbered eyebrows on sections that aren't part of the actual rescue narrative.
Don't mix the warm system (olive/gold/ember) with the cool system inside one section.
Don't apply glassmorphism decoratively outside structural surfaces (nav, cards, inputs, badge).
